featuresSub: Six powerful modules. One platform. Zero friction.
feature1Desc: Fast, intuitive ordering with modifiers, combos, split payments, and Stripe integration. Built for speed at the counter.
feature2Desc: Real-time order flow from counter to kitchen. Track prep times, manage stations, and never lose a ticket.
feature3Desc: Manage Uber Eats, Rappi, and DiDi from one screen. Per-platform markup rules, virtual brands, and P&L analytics.
feature4Desc: Track stock levels, set low-stock alerts, manage vendors and purchase orders. Know exactly what you have.
feature5Desc: Stamp cards, SMS campaigns, and customer profiles. Turn first-time visitors into regulars automatically.
feature6Desc: Smart upsell suggestions, dynamic pricing, combo recommendations, and shrinkage detection — powered by real-time data.

howStep3Desc: Take orders, track inventory, and grow your business from day one. Works on any device with a browser.

faqItems.q: What is a restaurant POS system?
faqItems.a: A restaurant POS (point of sale) system is software that manages orders, payments, inventory, and sales reports from a single platform. Desktop Kitchen is a modern POS designed specifically for quick-service restaurants, ghost kitchens, and delivery-first operators.

faqItems.q: Does Desktop Kitchen integrate with Uber Eats, Rappi, and DiDi Food?
faqItems.a: Yes. Desktop Kitchen pulls orders from Uber Eats, Rappi, and DiDi Food into a single screen. You can see per-platform commissions, set markup rules, and get real-time delivery P&L reports.

faqItems.q: Do I need special hardware to use Desktop Kitchen?
faqItems.a: No. Desktop Kitchen runs in any web browser — tablet, laptop, PC, or phone. No special hardware or dedicated POS terminals required.

faqItems.q: How much does Desktop Kitchen cost?
faqItems.a: Desktop Kitchen has a free-forever plan with up to 50 daily transactions. Paid plans start at $29 USD/month with unlimited transactions, delivery platform integration, and inventory management.

A ghost kitchen (also called a dark kitchen or cloud kitchen) is a restaurant that operates exclusively for delivery, with no dine-in space. Desktop Kitchen is ideal for ghost kitchens because it lets you manage multiple virtual brands, track per-platform commissions, and analyze profitability by brand.

faqItems.q: Can I run multiple virtual brands from one kitchen?
faqItems.a: Yes. With the Pro plan you can run up to 3 virtual brands, and the Ghost Kitchen plan supports unlimited brands — all from a single kitchen, with separate menus, markup rules, and P&L tracking per brand.
